            Natalie O’Shea
          
          
            
          
          
            Natalie O’Shea is a researcher and data visualization specialist with a passion for equity, accessibility, and human-centered design. She has worked in academic, government, and industry contexts and brings her passion for using data to help drive more equitable outcomes into all of these arenas.
